title: A NAI A GAMLA LOTE AH

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A nai a gamla lote ah
Ante min khin zo ta hi
Sim le zo mual lo zaang lo ah

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong ngai in an nei Topa
An la ding mi hong kuan sak in
An laak hun a kheng ma in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong kuan sak lai in nitak zong
Lo lai teng an khawm ding in

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: An kaikhawm khin ni hong tum the
